summary: Subtracting vectors, u − v, gives the vector that points from the tip of v to the tip of u. It is the same as adding the opposite of v. Componentwise, subtract matching components.
formulas: u − v = (u₁ − v₁, u₂ − v₂, u₃ − v₃)
method: Check both vectors have the same dimension.
Subtract v's components from u's, one position at a time.
